series_metadata.series_description: These files are meeting minutes from the Banking Commission. The meetings of the Banking Commission are held as required by the Superintendent of the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, transfer to State Archives. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for two (2) years from date of meeting, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for two (2) years from date of meeting, then destroy., Paper: Archives ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
